pi_items.source: Verified via HTTP request (curl) that the URL successfully hosts the real NYTimes US Counties Covid-19 dataset with matching columns.
Task description explicitly instructs the agent to read the dataset from this exact path.
Task description explicitly instructs the agent to create the package directory at this exact path.

pi_items.metadata_value: As of {date}, {county} County reported {cases} cases and {deaths} deaths.
pi_items.verified_value: As of {date}, {county} County reported {cases} cases and {deaths} deaths.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real COVID-19 US Counties data downloaded from the NYTimes GitHub repository. The dataset_path ('C:\workspace\data\us-counties-2020.csv'), expected_package_dir ('C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\data_extractor'), and the exact expected_string_format ('As of {date}, {county} County reported {cases} cases and {deaths} deaths.') are all explicitly enforced by the task instructions and match the verifier logic.
